visa_types.name: Employees of Accredited Organizations
visa_types.overview:
Employees of accredited organizations: please contact Visa Application Center by sending an email to info.swisschina@vfshelpline.com  (mailto:info.swisschina@vfshelpline.com)in
                                                                case you need the checklist of your visa application.
Please confirm if your company has already been accredited by the Embassy or Consulate General of Switzerland in China responsible for processing your visa application according to your company
                                                                location.
                                                            
- Companies already accredited by the Embassy or Consulate General of Switzerland in China and has a company account created by the Swiss Visa center:
Please register a new visa application for your employees and book an appointment.
- Companies already accredited by the Embassy or Consulate of Switzerland in China but has not yet created a company account:
Please send an email to: info.swisschina@vfshelpline.com (mailto:info.swisschina@vfshelpline.com)
 Please indicate the full name of your company in Chinese and in English as well as your contact details. The Swiss Visa Application Center will create a dedicated company account for your company.
 In case of any queries regarding accreditation, please contact directly the Swiss Embassy or Consulate General responsible for processing the visa application according to your company location.

Schengen Visa Application Form (CN-FR)
Schengen Visa Application Form (EN-DE)
Letter of Authorization
Declaration for domestic helpers and his/her employer

Please confirm if your company has already been accredited by the Embassy or Consulate General of Switzerland in China responsible for processing your visa application according to your company

- Companies already accredited by the Embassy or Consulate of Switzerland in China but has not yet created a company account:

Letter of Authorization
Declaration for domestic helpers and his/her employer

visa_types.name: Professional Purpose
visa_types.documents_required:
The Consulate may request you to provide additional documents or information, according to your personal situation, even after you have submitted your application at Visa Application
                                                                            Center. Please be aware that submitting a completed application does not guarantee the issuance of a visa.
Business Visit Checklist 
Schengen Visa Application Form (CN-FR)
Schengen Visa Application Form (EN-DE)
Letter of Authorization
Declaration for domestic helpers and his/her employer
visa_types.visa_fees:
The fee for the visa is due at the time the application is submitted and is not refundable. If you withdraw the application or it is rejected the fee will not be reimbursed.
The Swiss representation reserves the right to adapt the amounts of the fees at any time in relation with exchange rate fluctuations.
Visa and Service Fee:

[che > chn > en > guangzhou > Table:Professional Purpose > Visa Fees 1]
The visa fee is mandatory for all visa applications unless you are within the exemption categories.
- Short stay for children under six years of age
The visa fee for nationals from Armenia, Azerbaijan, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Georgia, Serbia, Ukraine and Moldova is CNY 270 (Euro 35).
Please note that satisfactory proof must be submitted to establish if one of the above exemptions applies.
The service fee applies for each applicant (children and adults). Applicants shall pay a service fee (inclusive of tax) of CNY 175 (Euro 21.20).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicants who wish to travel to Switzerland for a business trip or a professional training will stay no longer than 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants who wish to travel to Switzerland for a business trip or a professional training will stay no longer than 90 days.

## Visa Fees
The fee for the visa is due at the time the application is submitted and is not refundable. If you withdraw the application or it is rejected the fee will not be reimbursed.
The Swiss representation reserves the right to adapt the amounts of the fees at any time in relation with exchange rate fluctuations.
Visa and Service Fee:

[che > chn > en > guangzhou > Table:Professional Purpose > Visa Fees 1]
The visa fee is mandatory for all visa applications unless you are within the exemption categories.
- Short stay for children under six years of age
The visa fee for nationals from Armenia, Azerbaijan, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Georgia, Serbia, Ukraine and Moldova is CNY 270 (Euro 35).
Please note that satisfactory proof must be submitted to establish if one of the above exemptions applies.
The service fee applies for each applicant (children and adults). Applicants shall pay a service fee (inclusive of tax) of CNY 175 (Euro 21.20).

## Documents Required
The Consulate may request you to provide additional documents or information, according to your personal situation, even after you have submitted your application at Visa Application
                                                                            Center. Please be aware that submitting a completed application does not guarantee the issuance of a visa.
Business Visit Checklist 
Schengen Visa Application Form (CN-FR)
Schengen Visa Application Form (EN-DE)
Letter of Authorization
Declaration for domestic helpers and his/her employer

## Photo Specifications
Size 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm, color photo with white background, taken within 6 months, from the front and without any head-coverings. Please check the sample here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7GvhAu9iPnB88qcyOshz33/38247aa017ea1d13ea20dfa2dd50d46f/annex-a-photograph-guidelines.pdf).
For your own convenience, you can also choose to take compliant photograph at Swiss Visa Application Center. For more information, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/che/buy-services).

## Travel Medical Insurance
The insurance should be valid for the whole Schengen area and cover the whole period of your stay within the Schengen area.
- Notes: 
- The insurance policy should clearly indicate its validity for the whole Schengen area. The insurance covering Switzerland only is not compliant.
- If the travel insurance policy doesn’t indicate Schengen area and the zones covered by the insurance are shown in clauses, please also provide the photocopies of insurance
                                                                                        clauses (English, German, French, Italian or Romansh translation required if the policy is in Chinese).
- Insurance period: The insurance should cover the departure and return dates matching air ticket booking document, from the arrival day in the first Schengen country till
                                                                                        the departure day leaving the last Schengen country.
- Insured amount:
The insurance must have a minimum coverage of 30.000 Euro (around 300.000 RMB) including medical fees and repatriation costs.

visa_types.name: Family Reunion/Marriage/Study Visa
visa_types.overview:
Swiss Visa Application Centers do not process any kind of long stay visa applications for stays that exceed 90 days, including short stay working visa for duration of less than 90 days as this
                                                                visa type belongs to the national visa category. 
The visa applications should be lodged directly at the Embassy of Switzerland in Beijing or at the Consulate competent for your work, study or residence place. Please check the jurisdiction section
                                                                to know your consular area. You can then proceed to register and schedule an appointment on the website of the Swiss Visa Application Center in Beijing, Shanghai or Guangzhou.
For more details about long stay visa, please visit the website 
ttps://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/china/en/home/visa/entry-ch/more-90-days/documents-national.html (https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/china/en/home/visa/entry-ch/more-90-days/documents-national.html)
visa_types.full_text:
Swiss Visa Application Centers do not process any kind of long stay visa applications for stays that exceed 90 days, including short stay working visa for duration of less than 90 days as this
                                                                visa type belongs to the national visa category. 
The visa applications should be lodged directly at the Embassy of Switzerland in Beijing or at the Consulate competent for your work, study or residence place. Please check the jurisdiction section
                                                                to know your consular area. You can then proceed to register and schedule an appointment on the website of the Swiss Visa Application Center in Beijing, Shanghai or Guangzhou.
For more details about long stay visa, please visit the website 
ttps://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/china/en/home/visa/entry-ch/more-90-days/documents-national.html (https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/china/en/home/visa/entry-ch/more-90-days/documents-national.html)

visa_types.name: Work Visa
visa_types.overview:
- Procedure if your work permit has already been authorized:
- Make an appointment through Swiss Visa Application Centers to submit the documents at the Embassy/ Consulate. The appointment booking is free of charge.
- The following documents have to be handed in:
- Visa Application Form (https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/china/en/home/visa/entry-ch/more-90-days/documents-national.html)
- Passport
- Size 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm, color photo with white background, taken within 6 months and from the front without any head-coverings. Click here to view visa photo requirements.
- Copy of the permit from the migration office
- Visa fee
- It takes approximately 3-5 working days for the visa to be issued
- Procedure if you do not have an authorized work permit:
https://www.bfm.admin.ch/content/bfm/en/home/themen/arbeit/nicht-eu_efta-angehoerige.html (https://www.bfm.admin.ch/content/bfm/en/home/themen/arbeit/nicht-eu_efta-angehoerige.html)
visa_types.full_text:
